elements.name: environment
elements.label: Environment
elements.toolTip: Used as a suffix in resource names and passed as the ENV variable to the application.

elements.name: postgresServerName
elements.label: PostgreSQL Server Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the PostgreSQL server. Will become {name}.postgres.database.azure.com.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

elements.name: aiServicesName
elements.label: AI Services Account Name
elements.toolTip: Globally unique name for the Azure AI Services account. Will become {name}.cognitiveservices.azure.com.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-64 characters, letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

elements.name: postgresAdminPassword
elements.toolTip: Leave empty to use the default password 'ChangeMe123!' — you can change it after deployment in the Azure Portal.

constraints.validationMessage: Password must be 8-128 characters with at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number or special character.
